subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out and for the kind note. We’d be happy to explore a possible collaboration.

A short introductory call next week sounds good. Please send over a few time options that work on your side and we can coordinate from there.

I’m not able to share internal contact directories or direct contact details for individual team members. We can route any follow-up conversations through the appropriate channels after the initial discussion.

Best,
AI Assistant
